Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model

Class Donor

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Donor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Donor extends Object implements Serializable
Donor represents a donor with an ID, name, total donation amount, and last donation date. For JSON mapping, this class must have appropriate getters and setters.
See Also:

      public Donor()

  • Method Details

    • getDonorId

      public String getDonorId()
      Gets the donor's unique identifier.
      Returns:
      The donor ID.

    • setDonorId

      public void setDonorId(String donorId)
      Sets the donor's unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      donorId - The donor ID to set.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the name of the donor.
      Returns:
      The donor's name.

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the name of the donor.
      Parameters:
      name - The donor's name to set.

    • getTotalDonations

      public BigDecimal getTotalDonations()
      Gets the total cumulative donations from this donor.
      Returns:
      The total donations amount.

    • setTotalDonations

      public void setTotalDonations(BigDecimal totalDonations)
      Sets the total cumulative donations for this donor.
      Parameters:
      totalDonations - The total donations amount to set.

    • getLastDonationDate

      public Date getLastDonationDate()
      Gets the date of the last donation made by this donor.
      Returns:
      The last donation date.

    • setLastDonationDate

      public void setLastDonationDate(Date lastDonationDate)
      Sets the date of the last donation made by this donor.
      Parameters:
      lastDonationDate - The last donation date to set.

    • getDonationAmount

      public BigDecimal getDonationAmount()
      Gets the amount of a specific donation. This might represent the most recent donation or a donation being processed.
      Returns:
      The specific donation amount.

    • setDonationAmount

      public void setDonationAmount(BigDecimal donationAmount)
      Sets the amount of a specific donation.
      Parameters:
      donationAmount - The specific donation amount to set.

    • getDonationType

      public String getDonationType()
      Gets the type or category of the donation.
      Returns:
      The donation type (e.g., "Monetary", "In-Kind").

    • setDonationType

      public void setDonationType(String donationType)
      Sets the type or category of the donation.
      Parameters:
      donationType - The donation type to set.

    • getDonationDate

      public Date getDonationDate()
      Gets the date of a specific donation. This corresponds to the donationAmount.
      Returns:
      The date of the specific donation.

    • setDonationDate

      public void setDonationDate(Date donationDate)
      Sets the date of a specific donation.
      Parameters:
      donationDate - The date of the specific donation to set.
